# hrobot_server (Data Source)

Look up a Hetzner Robot dedicated server by its server number.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_server" "web" {
  id = 1234567
}

output "web_ip" {
  value = data.hrobot_server.web.server_ip
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Server number.

### Read-Only

- `cancelled` (Boolean)
- `dc` (String)
- `ips` (List of String)
- `paid_until` (String)
- `product` (String)
- `server_ip` (String)
- `server_name` (String)
- `status` (String)
